Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Continued To Apr-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel An Accounting And Provide A Copy Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Dec-24-2024 Continued To Jan-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Zachary J. Johnson for Charles Irwin, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Erika Gasaway for Wayne Lok, Respondent (via Zoom).
Jeffrey R. Loew, Guardian Ad Litem for minors Miles Irwin and Maya Irwin (via Zoom).

Mr. Johnson indicated that he rests on the submitted papers and emphasized that Mr. Lok waived objections and the accounting should be expedited. Ms. Gasaway acknowledged a clerical error in her prayer for relief, correcting the requested accounting deadline to June 30th instead of June 31st.

Discussion was held regarding procedural issues outlined in the examiner's notes, including notice requirements. Parties agreed to address notice issues and confirm electronic service for all parties.

After discussion, the court granted the request that Wayne Lok provide a copy of the trust, and ordered Wayne Lok to file and serve a copy of the trust instrument by January 7, 2025. The court continued all remaining matters to January 28, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
